description: A senior client wants to add their adult child as a trusted contact on their account for added security.

nodes.task_description: Explain the role of a trusted contact (i.e., they can be contacted about potential financial exploitation but cannot transact).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the permissions and limitations of the role.

nodes.task_description: Collect the trusted contact's name and contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the information for the designated person.

nodes.task_description: Add the trusted contact to the client's account profile.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the client's record with the trusted contact information.
